scripts.build: npm run build -w @kicable/shared && npm run build -w @kicable/client
scripts.build:static: npm run build -w @kicable/shared && VITE_BACKEND_URL= npm run build -w @kicable/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w @kicable/shared && npm run test -w @kicable/client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @kicable/shared && npm run test:coverage -w @kicable/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @kicable/shared && npm run typecheck -w @kicable/client
